SALARY CAP : $154.65M LUXURY TAX THRESHOLD (LTT): $187.90M

A salary cap is a limit on the amount teams can spend on player contracts,

which helps to maintain competitive balance in the league. There are some
exceptions to exceed the cap.

Any Team who exceeds the luxury tax threshold pays a penalty for each
dollar of their team salary that exceeds the tax level.

Information

Substitutions mode allows you to adjust the timing of intended
Substitutions during the rotation.

Use (A) to grab points, and () to drag them.

Use ®) to change how nearby positions are affected:

Override - Dragging will replace existing positions.
Extend - Dragging will extend the affected positions.
Displace - Dragging will push other points further.

Information

Position mode lets you move large stretches to different players.
Use (A) to select a stretch, and move with () or .

Use (Y) to toggle between selecting from a group,
and selecting the entire stretch for that player.

Use (X) and (L) to split the stretch at a specific time.

A salary cap is a limit on the amount teams can spend on player contracts,

which helps to maintain competitive balance in the league. There are some
exceptions to exceed the cap.

Any Team who exceeds the luxury tax threshold pays a penalty for each
dollar of their team salary that exceeds the tax level.
